RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0006 Page 3 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 03/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 644 920 3,813 01/12/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 445 4,258 16/05/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 137 4,395 01/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 800 5,195 04/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 224 1,944 6,915 19/09/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 2,333 9,248 21/02/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 766 1,022 9,504 19/04/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 2,042 11,546 23/08/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 195 - 11,351 02/03/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 11,351 27/09/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 585 705 11,471 10/01/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 346 - 11,125 22/08/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 11,125 04/02/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 619 1,575 12,081 03/11/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,557 13,638 10/12/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,091 14,729 07/11/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 14,729 17/04/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - - 14,729 Manual review
